name: live2d-haxe
description: Live2D Cubism SDK for Haxe - GPU shader rendering with multi-backend abstraction (cpp + hl, OpenFL/Flixel/Heaps)
releasenote: v1.1.0: New features: cross-backend perf panel (L2DPerfPanel + 3 implementations), VTube Studio model adapter (L2DVTuberModel with subdir scanning), runtime physics tuner (L2DPhysicsTuner with gravity/wind/strength control), mask RT 2x SSAA, demo polish (dynamic statusText Y). No breaking changes.
